sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 50:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 50:1
items.html: The Hey of Yod-Hey is filled with Yod like this: Hey-Yod. This is because the lower three of the four lights are canceled in the upper one in them, which is light of Hochma implied in the Yod. (Item 56)
